Equal Opportunity Employer

 RFC is an equal opportunity employer that welcomes diversity in our workplace. Applications will be reviewed from all qualified candidates no matter race, gender, ethnicity, age or physical status. We encourage applications from people with disabilities. Accommodations are available on request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process.
